name: Protection Relic
description: A basic Eridian relic focused on shield durability, improving one or more shield stats to make your defenses sturdier or quicker to recover.
notes:
It can improve up to two shield stats at once. The bonus reaches 30% in Normal Mode and can rise to 39% at the highest levels.

Its effects overlap with Skin of the Ancients, which merges Protection and Resistance relic bonuses.

special.description: Boosts shield capacity and, depending on the roll, shield recharge rate.
